Neon Runner (UNLOCK): a running game. you keep going until you stop.
Pixel Fight (UNLOCK): two players, one outcome. usually unclear why.
Glitch World (EXPERIMENTAL): the game works. until it doesn’t. that is expected.
Tower Stack (PHYSICS PACK): stack objects. they fall later, not immediately.
Sandbox Mode (FREE BUILD): no objective. just placement of objects.
Retro Arcade Pack (5 GAMES): five older-style games grouped together for convenience.
Bug Simulator (EARLY ACCESS): you observe errors while interacting with them.
Gravity Test Lab: gravity is applied. results may vary.
Infinite Clicker (IDLE GAME): clicking is required. progress is optional.
Boss Rush Mode (HARD): multiple enemies in sequence. no recovery period.
